zh.lifeSummary: Barbara Pfattheicher於大約1632年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖比。她於大約1652年與Hans Michel Pfatteicher在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1684年3月27日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德享年53歲，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Barbara Pfattheicher于大约1632年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖比。她于大约1652年与Hans Michel Pfatteicher在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1684年3月27日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德享年53岁，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: Barbara Pfattheicher was born about 1632, in Büchig, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. She married Hans Michel Pfatteicher about 1652, in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 27 March 1684, in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, at the age of 53, and was buried in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

fr.lifeSummary: Barbara Pfattheicher est née environ 1632, à Büchig, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Elle a épousé Hans Michel Pfatteicher environ 1652, à Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1684, à Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

Sie hat um 1652 in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Hans Michel Pfatteicher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1684 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden und wurde in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden begraben.

ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス カルルスルヘストゥテンセブuチグ
ja.lifeSummary: Barbara Pfattheicherは約1632年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス カルルスルヘストゥテンセブuチグで生まれた。約1652年にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘブランケンロチでHans Michel Pfatteicherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1684年3月27日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘハグスフエルドで53歳で死去し，バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘハグスフエルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Blankenlöch, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württember: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 블랭켄럭
독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 브u치그
ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Pfattheicher(은)는 대략 1632년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 브u치그에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1652년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 블랭켄럭에서 Hans Michel Pfatteicher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1684년 3월 27일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 하그스펠드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 하그스펠드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Barbara Pfattheicher nasceu aproximadamente 1632, em Büchig, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Ela casou-se com Hans Michel Pfatteicher aproximadamente 1652, em Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1684, em Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

ru.lifeSummary: Barbara Pfattheicher родилась около 1632 г. в местности бuчиг, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Michel Pfatteicher около 1652 г. в местности бланкенлоч, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 27 марта 1684 г. в местности хагсфелд, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности хагсфелд, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден.

Murió el 27 de marzo de 1684, en Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.
